name: 2nd-B Soul Core Symbol Pilot
core_correction: The Soul Core must read as a living soul flame / heart core first. The tesseract is a thin rear halo, not the subject.
batch_rule: Do not batch-generate remaining cores until this pilot is approved; use this only as a direction checkpoint.
visual_targets: heart/flame silhouette readable at thumbnail size
strong ink outline with selective colored rim
tesseract support recedes behind the symbol
